intro: The White House lifted export restrictions on Anthropic's Mythos and Fable AI models after the company agreed to implement enhanced security measures, restoring access for international users starting July 1. AI strategist Sol Rashidi highlighted a growing challenge: managing unreliable AI agents consumed significant time, prompting her to deactivate half her fleet to focus on higher-value work. Separately, Together AI secured $800 million in funding to expand its cloud platform for open-source AI models, while Google released Gemini Spark on Mac with agentic capabilities.

whitelist.title: White House Lifts Restrictions On Anthropic’s Mythos And Fable AI Models
whitelist.desc: Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick said the decision was made after Anthropic agreed to “proactively detect and address security risks.”

whitelist.title: The Trump Administration Is Lifting Its Export Controls on Anthropic’s Mythos and Fable AI Models
whitelist.desc: The White House is easing restrictions on Anthropic’s most advanced AI models weeks after ordering the company to suspend access for foreign nationals.
